allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P "17102005" -d ApartmentManagement -C -Q "SELECT TOP 15 apartment_code, occupancy_type, status, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM household_members hm WHERE hm.apartment_id=a.apartment_id AND hm.is_active=1\) AS tv FROM apartments a ORDER BY building, floor_number, apartment_code" -W -s"|")

Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P "17102005" -d ApartmentManagement -C -Q "SELECT apartment_code, occupancy_type, status, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM household_members hm WHERE hm.apartment_id=a.apartment_id AND hm.is_active=1\) AS tv FROM apartments a WHERE apartment_code IN \('A-0801','A-0802','A-0901','A-1005','A-1201','A-0105'\) ORDER BY apartment_code" -W -s"|")
Bash(sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P "17102005" -d ApartmentManagement -C -Q "SELECT definition FROM sys.check_constraints WHERE name='CK_apartments_occupancy'" -W)
